name: Strength Scaling
summary: Stack Strength and end fights with one giant Heavy Blade.
howToPlay: Pick up Strength sources early (Inflame, Vajra), then convert with Heavy Blade and multi-hit attacks. Thin the deck so you draw your payoffs every turn.

name: Barricade Block
summary: Out-sustain everything by keeping Block turn over turn.
howToPlay: Lean on Block retention and Thorns/Plated Armor. Survive the long game while chip damage and Strength close it out.

name: Poison Inevitability
summary: Apply enough Poison that the math is already over.
howToPlay: Front-load Poison application, then survive. Catalyst-style multipliers turn a few stacks into lethal. Great into bosses with big HP pools.

name: Shiv Storm
summary: Flood the turn with free Shivs and Strength-per-Shiv payoffs.
howToPlay: Generate Shivs, draw aggressively, and add per-Shiv damage boosts. Fast clears keep you healthy through the act.

name: Focused Lightning
summary: Channel Lightning, crank Focus, let the orbs do the work.
howToPlay: Build Focus early, channel Lightning for scaling AoE, and use Dualcast/evoke to spike damage on demand.

name: Frost Tank
summary: Stall behind a wall of Frost while a slow win condition matures.
howToPlay: Channel Frost for near-unkillable defense, raise Focus, and grind out fights you can't lose.

name: Star Decrees
summary: Bank Stars and unload game-swinging Decrees.
howToPlay: Generate Stars consistently, then spend on high-impact Decrees at the right moment. Court summons buy time to bank resources.

name: Minion Swarm
summary: Keep a full board of minions and buff them wide.
howToPlay: Summon early and often, protect your board, and stack minion buffs. Corpse generation refills the engine after sacrifices.
